name: experts
description: Shared harness-neutral helper for listing, installing, updating, creating, scaffolding, and validating reusable Experts packages.
portable_invocation: Use natural language that names the Experts helper, such as 'Experts: list available experts' or 'Use the Experts helper to install <name>'. Dollar-prefixed aliases are harness-specific conveniences only.

workflow.sync: Treat EXPERTS_REPO_URL as canonical. Clone or fetch into EXPERTS_REPO_CACHE before listing, installing, updating, or creating experts.
workflow.discover: Run ./install.sh --list from the synced checkout. Do not hardcode expert names.
workflow.install: Resolve friendly names against the dynamic list, then run ./install.sh --expert <expert-name> --hydrate. Retry without --hydrate if network hydration is unavailable.
workflow.create: Follow templates/CREATE_EXPERT.md and templates/EXPERT_BLUEPRINT.md from the synced checkout.
